pages.text: $(8)You are able to leap by default. You can leap by holding shift to charge your leap, and then clicking to leap. Your leap strength and damage is affected by your Jump and Claws skill.
pages.title: Leap

pages.text: $(8)Sprint Leap is only available once you've reached Speed skill level 8. Sprint for a while and a new bar will appear. Once that bar reaches the top, you will be able to leap. Once you've reached Speed level 9, you will also climb blocks of up to 1.2 blocks tall without needing to jump.$(br)
pages.title: Sprint Leap
